---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work as documented
title: "[plugin-name] short description"
labels: bug
---

## Which plugin and version

e.g. `smartsheet@1.0.0`

## What you did

The exact request you made to Claude, or the exact tool call, plus what you expected to happen.

## What happened

The actual response (paste any error message verbatim). **Do not paste your API token.** If the error includes a token, redact it.

## Environment

- Claude client: Cowork / Desktop / which version?
- OS: macOS / Windows / Linux + version
- Anything unusual (corporate proxy, VPN, etc.)

## Note

This is a personal project maintained part-time. There is no SLA. For install / token-generation help, please email tmf77@cornell.edu instead of opening an issue — that's faster.
